-- 3 of 5 --

Screencap Tools
Audio
• 	Audio quality is important
• 	Use external mic, don’t use your computer’s built in mic
• 	Headset mics are cheap, work great… and they aren’t impacted by
the recording environment
• 	I like headset mics by Plantronics, Sennheiser, and Logitech
• 	Get a USB headset… $30 to $150
• 	Headsets look geeky if you’re going to be on camera
Module 5: Creating Your Prelaunch Content
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 5 --

Screencap Tools
Audio
• 	Desktop mics
• 	Trickier to set up and they’re significantly impacted by the
recording environment
• 	Don’t look geeky :-)
• 	Get USB… I like the Audio Technica AT2020
Module 5: Creating Your Prelaunch Content
